articles.title: XRP Set For Massive Boost As Ripple CEO Expresses Excitement For Upcoming Upgrades On the XRP Ledger
articles.description: Ripple CEO Brad Garlinghouse has expressed his enthusiasm for the forthcoming enhancements to the XRP Ledger (XRPL), which aim to improve its programmability and utility.

articles.title: Here’s Why Bitcoin is Struggling to Hit a New High, According to IntoTheBlock
articles.description: Many BTC traders could offload their assets in the $61,700- $70,500 range as they try to minimize their losses and break even.

articles.title: Polygon Starts MATIC to POL Token Migration
articles.description: Polygon begins migrating from MATIC to POL tokens, aiming to enhance network functionality and support its ambitious Polygon 2.0 roadmap.

articles.title: Polygon developers transition MATIC token to POL
articles.description: Polygon developers have migrated the MATIC token to POL after a year of extensive community-led discussions.

articles.title: Ripple (XRP) IPO in the US? CEO Brad Garlinghouse Weighs In
articles.description: Discover what Garlinghouse thinks of a potential Ripple IPO in the United States.

articles.title: Crypto Markets Dump 6%, Magnificent 7 Shed $550B, as ‘Slumptember’ Begins
articles.description: The world’s leading companies have lost billions of dollars in market capitalization amid a stock market slump in what is traditionally a bearish month.
